sourceRefs.summary: 2025 SETD1B broad H3K4me3 paper claim graph.
Figure-to-claim map for the 2025 SETD1B paper.
Local 2025 supplementary workbooks S1, S5, and S8.
Local pdftotext extraction for methods, data availability, and figure legends.

objective: Produce a first-pass, refs-first reproduction plan for the 2025 SETD1B broad H3K4me3 paper using only local evidence and supplementary Tables S1, S5, and S8. The plan separates table-level partial checks from missing raw/processed sequencing evidence and marks unresolved causal claims as insufficient-evidence.

steps.title: Inventory local 2025 inputs
steps.purpose: Confirm which evidence can be used without new downloads: PDF text, claim/figure maps, dataset inventory, and supplementary Tables S1/S5/S8.

outputRefs.summary: Boundary row distinguishing local table checks from missing sequencing execution.

steps.title: Check broad H3K4me3 and H3K27ac domain tables
steps.purpose: Parse Supplementary Table S5 to verify broad-domain counts, length threshold compliance, promoter/distal categories, and RS2/RS4/RS8 broad status counts.

inputRefs.summary: Sheets: Broad H3K4me3 domains and Broad H3K27ac domains.
Broad domains are defined by merging peaks within 500 bp and retaining merged intervals longer than 5 kb.

outputRefs.summary: Table-level counts and length statistics for broad H3K4me3/H3K27ac domains.

methodRefs.summary: Local bounded workbook parse using Python zipfile and SpreadsheetML XML; no GEO download.

steps.title: Compute H3K27ac overlap with broad H3K4me3
steps.purpose: Use Table S5 interval coordinates to compute any-base interval overlap between listed H3K4me3 and H3K27ac broad domains, both overall and within RS2/RS4/RS8 broad-status subsets.

outputRefs.summary: Overall and stage-wise H3K27ac/H3K4me3 overlap fractions from local Table S5.

methodRefs.summary: Sorted interval overlap over Table S5 coordinates; denominator reported explicitly.

steps.title: Check temporal expression gene sets
steps.purpose: Parse Supplementary Table S8 to test whether early and late gene sets show the expected RS2/RS4 versus RS8/RS10 expression and H3K4me3 timing.

inputRefs.summary: Sheets: Early expressed genes and Lately expressed genes.
Fig. 7 legend describes early and late broad-H3K4me3-marked genes across RS4, RS8, and LS stages.

outputRefs.summary: Median expression/H3K4me3 timing and peak-stage counts from Table S8.

methodRefs.summary: Local bounded workbook parse and per-gene peak-stage summary.

steps.title: Separate Setd1b and Rfx2 perturbation evidence from local tables
steps.purpose: Use Table S1 to confirm perturbation sample availability while marking missing cKO/KO processed domain, occupancy, and expression outputs as insufficient-evidence when only sample metadata or PDF text is present.

inputRefs.summary: Sample/library metadata sheets for ChIP-seq, NOMe-seq, and RNA-seq.
Text reports Setd1b cKO loss of broad H3K4me3 and H3K27ac changes.
Text reports Rfx2 KO broad-domain reduction and exogenous RFX2-SETD1B co-IP.

outputRefs.summary: Setd1b perturbation has discoverable samples but insufficient local computed output.
Rfx2 perturbation remains insufficient from local tables.

steps.title: Plan gene length, baseline expression, and stage confounding checks
steps.purpose: Specify minimum sensitivity analyses needed before claiming causal control: gene length matched controls, baseline expression stratification, annotation version lock, replicate/batch checks, and stage-composition checks.

inputRefs.summary: Contains baseline and spermatid-stage expression/H3K4me3 values, but no gene length annotation.
Methods use mm10 RefSeq annotation, DESeq2, FPKM, and broad-domain assignment.

outputRefs.summary: Confounding checks that remain required before stronger verdicts.

fallbackPolicy.condition: Only local supplementary workbooks are available and raw/processed GEO data are not downloaded.
fallbackPolicy.action: Emit table-level partially-reproduced rows for checks that can be computed from S5/S8, and mark ChIP-seq/RNA-seq reprocessing claims as insufficient-evidence.

fallbackPolicy.condition: A claim depends on sharp H3K4me3 peaks, Setd1b cKO domain calling, Pol II/TAF3 occupancy redistribution, Rfx2 KO domains, or gene-length matching.
fallbackPolicy.action: Do not infer reproduction from PDF text alone; record the missing input/output and keep the verdict insufficient-evidence until processed BED/bigWig/count matrices or raw execution artifacts are materialized.

diagnostics: No large GEO files or raw sequencing reads were downloaded.
Supplementary Table S5 supports broad-domain table checks but not independent peak calling from ChIP-seq signal.
Supplementary Table S8 supports temporal gene-set expression checks but not Setd1b/Rfx2 perturbation causality by itself.
